title: Still warm
premise: Another scavenger, minutes ahead of you.

stages.narration: They were here, and not long ago: a wrapper still folding itself open, drawers gone through with a haste you recognise. You are sharing this city with the living, and the living are competition.

choices.label: Whoever they are, go the other way
Risk a low call — maybe they'll trade, not fight

notes: scavenger-sign. Tracking is intel at the price of nerves; leaving is free but uneasy; hailing gambles a spike of exposure (noise + stress) against a flicker of hope. No one actually appears — the tension is the beat.
